2603.26266.title: GUIDE: Resolving Domain Bias in GUI Agents through Real-Time Web Video Retrieval and Plug-and-Play Annotation
2603.26266.paper_summary: Large vision-language models have endowed GUI agents with strong general capabilities for interface understanding and interaction. However, due to insufficient exposure to domain-specific software operation data during training, these agents exhibit significant domain bias - they lack familiarity with the specific operation workflows (planning) and UI element layouts (grounding) of particular applications, limiting their real-world task performance. In this paper, we present GUIDE (GUI Unbiasing via Instructional-Video Driven Expertise), a training-free, plug-and-play framework that resolves GUI agent domain bias by autonomously acquiring domain-specific expertise from web tutorial videos through a retrieval-augmented automated annotation pipeline. GUIDE introduces two key innovations. First, a subtitle-driven Video-RAG pipeline unlocks video semantics through subtitle analysis, performing progressive three-stage retrieval - domain classification, topic extraction, and relevance matching - to identify task-relevant tutorial videos. Second, a fully automated annotation pipeline built on an inverse dynamics paradigm feeds consecutive keyframes enhanced with UI element detection into VLMs, inferring the required planning and grounding knowledge that are injected into the agent's corresponding modules to address both manifestations of domain bias. Extensive experiments on OSWorld demonstrate GUIDE's generality as a plug-and-play component for both multi-agent systems and single-model agents. It consistently yields over 5% improvements and reduces execution steps - without modifying any model parameters or architecture - validating GUIDE as an architecture-agnostic enhancement to bridge GUI agent domain bias.
2603.26266.paper_summary_zh: 大型視覺語言模型賦予 GUI 代理強大的界面理解和互動能力。<lb/>然而，由於在訓練過程中對於特定領域軟體操作數據的曝光不足，這些代理顯示出顯著的領域偏見——它們對特定應用程序的操作工作流程（規劃）和 UI 元素佈局（基礎）缺乏熟悉度，限制了它們在現實世界任務中的表現。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了 GUIDE（通過教學視頻驅動專業知識的 GUI 去偏見），這是一個無需訓練的即插即用框架，通過檢索增強的自動註釋管道，自主獲取領域特定的專業知識，從而解決 GUI 代理的領域偏見。<lb/>GUIDE 引入了兩個關鍵創新。<lb/>首先，基於字幕的視頻 RAG 管道通過字幕分析解鎖視頻語義，執行逐步的三階段檢索——領域分類、主題提取和相關性匹配——以識別與任務相關的教學視頻。<lb/>其次，基於逆動力學範式構建的全自動註釋管道將增強了 UI 元素檢測的連續關鍵幀輸入 VLM，推斷所需的規劃和基礎知識，這些知識被注入到代理的相應模塊中，以解決領域偏見的兩種表現形式。<lb/>在 OSWorld 上的廣泛實驗證明了 GUIDE 作為即插即用組件的通用性，適用於多代理系統和單模型代理。<lb/>它始終帶來超過 5% 的改進並減少執行步驟——無需修改任何模型參數或架構——驗證了 GUIDE 作為架構無關的增強，旨在彌補 GUI 代理的領域偏見。
2603.26266.author: Rui Xie et.al.
2603.26266.authors: Rui Xie, Zhi Gao, Chenrui Shi, Zirui Shang, Lu Chen, Qing Li
